terms.definition: One functional unit placed in a PatchLab graph.
terms.note: Use node only for framework internals, source identifiers, quotations, or comparisons where the other product uses that term.

terms.definition: A graph of blocks, connections, values, and nested graphs.
A block whose interior is another graph.
A parent-facing control mapped to one or more parameters inside a container.
A designed musician-facing interface for a patch or block.
